summary: Built context-retrieve tool at tools/context-retrieve. Features: (1) Keyword search in capsules (JSON/JSONL), (2) Session index search via SQLite FTS, (3) OpenViking semantic search when available, (4) Priority: current session capsules → session index → cross-session capsules → vector index. Output: structured JSON with snippets, relevance scores, and truncated content. Self-test passed. Health check shows degraded due to OpenViking unavailable (non-blocking).
